Octopuses have three hearts.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries aren't.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
Honey never spoils; archaeologists found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs.
Cows have best friends and get stressed when separated.
A sneeze can travel as fast as 100 miles per hour.
There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all Earth’s beaches.
The Eiffel Tower can be 15 cm taller during hot days.
A single strand of spaghetti is called a spaghetto.
Wombat poop is cube-shaped.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
Butterflies taste with their feet.
A day on Mercury lasts about 59 Earth days.
The longest word in English has 189,819 letters.
There are more possible iterations of chess moves than atoms in the known universe.
Some turtles can breathe through their butts.
A bolt of lightning contains enough energy to toast 100,000 slices of bread.
The human nose can remember 50,000 different scents.
Sharks existed before trees.
The Great Wall of China is not visible from space without aid.
A cloud can weigh more than a million pounds.
The inventor of the Frisbee was turned into a Frisbee after he died.
There are more fake flamingos in the world than real ones.
A hummingbird's heart beats up to 1,260 times per minute.
Some bamboo species can grow almost a meter in a single day.
The moon is slowly drifting away from Earth, about 1.5 inches per year.
A shrimp's heart is in its head.
The first alarm clock could only ring at 4 a.m.
The shortest war in history lasted 38 minutes.
Cows can sleep while standing up, but they only dream when lying down.
Polar bear skin is black and its fur is transparent.
The world's oldest piece of chewing gum is over 9,000 years old.
Some frogs can freeze without dying.
A jiffy is an actual time unit equal to 1/100th of a second.
In Switzerland it's illegal to own just one guinea pig because they get lonely.
A single teaspoon of honey represents the life work of 12 bees.
The blue whale's heart is the size of a small car.
The fingerprints of koalas are so similar to humans, they can fool crime scene investigators.
A day on Earth lasts 24 hours, but a Martian day is 24 hours, 39 minutes.
A snail can sleep for three years.
The inventor of the microwave oven only received $2 for his discovery.
The Sahara Desert is expanding by about 0.8 km per month.
There are more trees on Earth than stars in the Milky Way.
Some octopuses can detach an arm and regrow it later.
Sound travels about 4 times faster in water than in air.
A newborn kangaroo is about 1 inch long.
The oldest known living tree is over 4,800 years old.
A caterpillar has more muscles than a human.
The world’s smallest reptile is smaller than a paperclip.
Venus rotates backward compared to most planets.
A single lightning bolt can contain up to 1 billion volts of electricity.
Some spiders can fly through the air by ballooning with silk threads.
There are more bacteria in your mouth than people on Earth.
